name: failing-forward
description: John C. Maxwell's Failing Forward — transform your relationship with failure into a stepping stone for success by learning to treat mistakes as feedback, not final judgments
useCase: Helps anyone who struggles with fear of failure, resilience, or persistence reframe setbacks as learning opportunities, take more risks, and keep moving forward through the Try-Learn-Adjust cycle.
knownRisks: Reframing failure is not a substitute for genuine skill-building or addressing systemic barriers
